scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: wait-on http-get://localhost:3333/api/health -t 45000 -i 1000 && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
